roleDescription: Harrington & Cole LLP is a well-established litigation boutique seeking a Senior Insurance Defense Associate to join our growing practice. The ideal candidate will have 4-7 years of experience in insurance defense litigation, including handling files from inception through trial. Responsibilities include managing a caseload of personal injury, workers compensation, and general liability matters, taking and defending depositions, drafting motions for summary judgment, and communicating directly with insurance carrier clients. The firm operates in a hybrid environment with 3 days in-office required. We are looking for a collaborative attorney who is comfortable working independently and has strong written and oral advocacy skills. Bar admission in Missouri is required.
resumeText:
Michael T. Reyes, J.D.
Bar Admission: Missouri (2018), Illinois (2018)

Experience:
Smith & Vickers LLC, St. Louis, MO (2018 - Present)
Associate Attorney - Insurance Defense
- Handle caseload of 60+ active insurance defense matters including personal injury, workers compensation, slip and fall, and general liability
- Take and defend depositions, argue motions, and appear at mediations
- Draft motions for summary judgment and appellate briefs
- Work directly with major insurance carrier clients including State Farm, Travelers, and Zurich
- 6 years of experience in insurance defense litigation

Education:
Saint Louis University School of Law, J.D. 2018
University of Missouri, B.A. Political Science, 2015
screenNotes: Strong phone screen. Michael has 6 years of insurance defense experience which matches the role perfectly. Currently handling a caseload very similar to what Harrington & Cole is looking for. He mentioned he is open to a hybrid schedule and is comfortable with the 3-day in-office requirement. Salary expectations are in range at $145k-$160k. He is not actively looking but is open to the right opportunity. No relocation needed - lives in Clayton, MO. No non-compete concerns mentioned. Very polished communicator, trial-ready.
